candidate_designs.anti_curve_fit_argument: The session block is selected from the v0_54 train dominant behavior and checked in validation; the entry and exit use fixed block boundaries with no session-window or threshold optimization.
candidate_designs.exact_direction_rule: Derive direction from train only: if train mean block_return_points for asian_00_06 is positive use long; if negative use short; if zero, reject before testing. Current v0_54 train value implies long.
candidate_designs.exact_entry_rule: On each train/validation day with a complete asian_00_06 M15 block, enter once at the first M15 open inside that fixed UTC block.
candidate_designs.exact_invalidation_rule: Invalidate the day if the asian_00_06 block is incomplete, the first M15 open or final block close is missing, or the train-derived direction is zero.
candidate_designs.expected_trade_frequency: At most one completed fixed session-block observation per train/validation trading day.
main_failure_modes: session bias disappears after transaction-cost modeling
validation positive mean is driven by a small number of large days
overnight liquidity or spread conditions make fixed-block entry unrealistic
candidate_designs.market_logic: v0_54 found the fixed asian_00_06 session block had the clearest train session-return bias and the same block remained positive in validation (4.66648854961831 points).
candidate_designs.minimum_data_required: At least 100 train observations and 50 validation observations for the selected fixed session block.
candidate_designs.stop_loss_logic: Use the opposite edge of the prior completed fixed session block range as the structural stop; for long use that prior block low, for short use that prior block high. Do not optimize distance.
candidate_designs.take_profit_or_exit_logic: No optimized profit target; exit at the final M15 close inside the same fixed asian_00_06 block.
candidate_designs.time_session_filter: Only the fixed UTC asian_00_06 block from v0_54.
candidate_designs.train_validation_test_plan: In v0_56, compute train and validation return distribution, adverse excursion to structural stop, trade count, positive rate, month concentration, and transaction-cost sensitivity using only this fixed design.
candidate_designs.volatility_filter: None in this design; volatility filters are reserved for separate v0_55 designs.

candidate_designs.anti_curve_fit_argument: The source and destination blocks are fixed from the v0_54 session map; no transition pair, threshold, or stop/exit distance is searched.
candidate_designs.exact_direction_rule: Use the same train-derived direction as the asian_00_06 block: long for current v0_54 evidence; if the selected session mean is zero, reject before testing.
candidate_designs.exact_entry_rule: When the fixed asian_00_06 block closes in the train-derived direction, enter at the first M15 open of the next fixed session block.
candidate_designs.exact_invalidation_rule: Invalidate if either the source session block or the next fixed session block is incomplete, or if the source session block closes against the train-derived direction.
candidate_designs.expected_trade_frequency: Less than daily; only days where the source block closes in the fixed train-derived direction.
main_failure_modes: continuation is weaker than same-session return
entry after the source block captures exhausted movement
transition sample is smaller and more concentrated than the base session design
candidate_designs.market_logic: v0_54 suggests fixed session behavior matters; this design tests whether the asian_00_06 bias continues into the next predeclared session block without using intraday signal chasing.
candidate_designs.minimum_data_required: At least 100 train transitions and 50 validation transitions after the fixed close-direction condition.
candidate_designs.stop_loss_logic: Use the completed source session block's opposite extreme as the structural stop; for long use the source block low, for short use the source block high.
candidate_designs.take_profit_or_exit_logic: No optimized target; exit at the final M15 close of the next fixed session block.
candidate_designs.time_session_filter: Transition from fixed asian_00_06 to its next fixed UTC session block only.
candidate_designs.train_validation_test_plan: In v0_56 only if the primary session design is not selected, compute fixed transition counts, return distribution, stop interaction, month concentration, and validation consistency.

candidate_designs.anti_curve_fit_argument: The bucket is the v0_54 train-dominant descriptive label, not an optimized volatility threshold; the design must keep that label fixed even though validation highlighted a different high-volatility bucket.
candidate_designs.exact_direction_rule: Use train only: if mean same_day_close_open_points for medium_high_volatility_quartile is positive use long; if negative use short; if zero, reject before testing. Do not switch to high_volatility_quartile after validation review.
candidate_designs.exact_entry_rule: For each train/validation day labeled medium_high_volatility_quartile by the v0_54 daily-range quartile method, enter at the first available M15 open of the day.
candidate_designs.exact_invalidation_rule: Invalidate the day if the fixed descriptive volatility label is not medium_high_volatility_quartile, if a full day open/close is missing, or if the train-derived direction is zero.
candidate_designs.expected_trade_frequency: One observation on train/validation days labeled medium_high_volatility_quartile; fewer than daily.
main_failure_modes: train and validation dominant volatility buckets differ
descriptive quartile labels leak if recomputed outside the intended split policy
daily open-to-close behavior is too coarse for executable risk control
candidate_designs.market_logic: v0_54 showed positive same-day behavior in descriptive volatility buckets, with train strongest in medium_high_volatility_quartile and validation strongest in high_volatility_quartile; this design keeps the bucket definition fixed and descriptive.
candidate_designs.minimum_data_required: At least 100 train labeled days and 50 validation labeled days after applying the fixed bucket.
candidate_designs.stop_loss_logic: Use the prior completed day's high-low range as a non-optimized structural stop distance from entry; for long subtract the range, for short add the range.
candidate_designs.take_profit_or_exit_logic: No optimized target; exit at the last available M15 close of the same UTC day.
candidate_designs.time_session_filter: Full UTC day; no intraday session chasing.
candidate_designs.train_validation_test_plan: In v0_56, recompute only the predeclared descriptive labels under the existing split policy, then measure train/validation same-day returns, bucket counts, month concentration, and structural-stop hit rate.
candidate_designs.volatility_filter: Only the fixed descriptive medium_high_volatility_quartile bucket from v0_54 train dominance.

candidate_designs.anti_curve_fit_argument: Only the momentum interpretation is tested, based on the train sign from v0_54; mean reversion is not tested in the same candidate and no bucket threshold is searched.
candidate_designs.exact_direction_rule: Momentum only: use long because train same_day_close_open_points for medium_high_volatility_quartile is positive; do not switch to mean reversion or a different bucket after validation.
candidate_designs.exact_entry_rule: On days labeled medium_high_volatility_quartile by the fixed v0_54 daily-range quartile method, enter at the 12:00 UTC M15 open.
candidate_designs.exact_invalidation_rule: Invalidate if the day is not labeled medium_high_volatility_quartile, if the 12:00 UTC M15 open is missing, or if the same-day close required for the fixed exit is missing.
candidate_designs.expected_trade_frequency: Only train/validation days with medium_high_volatility_quartile label and a 12:00 UTC M15 candle.
main_failure_modes: midday entry is not what the daily open-to-close profiler measured
validation dominance shifted to a different volatility bucket
fixed half-range stop is too coarse without optimization
candidate_designs.market_logic: v0_54 observed same-day positive momentum in the train-dominant medium_high_volatility_quartile descriptive volatility regime; this design tests that single momentum interpretation only.
candidate_designs.minimum_data_required: At least 100 train labeled midday observations and 50 validation labeled midday observations.
candidate_designs.stop_loss_logic: Use half of the prior completed day's high-low range as a fixed descriptive stop distance; this fraction is predeclared for design review and must not be optimized in v0_56.
candidate_designs.take_profit_or_exit_logic: No optimized target; exit at the last available M15 close of the same UTC day.
candidate_designs.train_validation_test_plan: In v0_56 only after the recommended design, measure the fixed midday momentum rule on train/validation rows, including labeled-day counts, stop interaction, and validation sign consistency.
candidate_designs.volatility_filter: Only the fixed descriptive medium_high_volatility_quartile bucket from v0_54 train dominance.

next_recommended_step: v0_56 fixed-rule train/validation evaluation for session_block_directional_bias_candidate only, no OOS
